Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-EIC Reject to be performed after SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-AE Recommendation overdue to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and SW-EIC Reject in variants that include SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-EIC Reject after the last reviewer activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-EIC Reject in cases where the variant includes multiple reviewer assignment cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time of SW-EIC Reject in comparison with the duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time it takes SW-EIC Reject to occur after the completion of all assigned reviewers’ responses (i.e., after the final SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' or `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-EIC Reject in variants that pass through SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Minimum time between Plagiarism Originality Report Completed and SW-EIC Reject in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed appears
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-EIC Reject when the variant includes at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Average time to SW-EIC Reject since the first occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in complex reviewer selection variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-EIC Reject'

Minimum time from SW–Major Revision due in 1 week to SW-EIC Reject
